(Translated by Google)
YPF station at the ACA, as always, everything's fine.

reviews.comment:
La nafta es cara, y tienen seis surtidores de los cuales sólo atienden dos chicos, y están en temporada alta por eso se hacen largas colas.

(Translated by Google)
Gasoline is expensive, and they have six pumps, but only two guys are working them, and it's peak season, so there are long lines.

reviews.comment:
La estación Está buena la cafetería está bastante bien pero los playeros de la estación son un desastre a los socios del automóvil Club no le conviene pagar para que los atiendan así

(Translated by Google)
The station is good, the cafeteria is quite nice, but the attendants are a disaster; it's not worth it for members of the Automobile Club to pay for such service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvektURkpBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención como todos los establecimientos del Automóvil Club Argentino...!!! Siempre hay mucha gente... casi en cualquier horario. Las instalaciones muy limpias y cuidadas. A parte de la estación de servicio también tienen un hotel...

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, like all the Automobile Club Argentino establishments...!!! It's always busy... almost at any time. The facilities are very clean and well-maintained. Besides the service station, they also have a hotel...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJX2FTRFZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del personal. Brinda muy buenos servicios necesarios para el automóvil. Reciben tarjetas de crédito y débito.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent customer service. They provide very good services for your car. They accept credit and debit cards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvaU9lc01nEAE
